            res = midSpeed
            maxSpeed = midSpeed - 1

        else:
            minSpeed = midSpeed + 1

    return res

import math
def repairCars(ranks, cars):
    # print(ranks[1:])
    ranks.sort()
    left = 1
    right = cars
    min_car = float("inf")
    while (left<=right):
        mid = (left + right) // 2
        res = piles(mid,ranks,cars)
        if res[0]:
            min_car = min(min_car,res[1])
            right = mid - 1
            # print(1)
        else:
            left = mid + 1
            # print(2)
    return min_car
def piles(mid,ranks,cars):
    count1 = ranks[0]*(mid)*(mid)
    for i in range(1,len(ranks)):
        rem = math.ceil((cars - mid)/len(ranks[i:]))
        count2 = ranks[i]*(rem)*(rem)
        if count2<count1:
            return [True,count1]
    return [False,count1]
